'''âz-ng-y''' ('''kazangay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuppify|yuppify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuppify|yuppify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| kazangay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizangay|thizangay]] || [[word:jizangay|jizangay]] || [[word:shizangay|shizangay]] || [[word:kizangay|kizangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzangay|thuthuzangay]] || [[word:jujuzangay|jujuzangay]] || [[word:shushuzangay|shushuzangay]] || [[word:kukuzangay|kukuzangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzangay|thuzangay]] || [[word:juzangay|juzangay]] || [[word:shuzangay|shuzangay]] || [[word:kuzangay|kuzangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzangay|thuzangay]] || [[word:juzangay|juzangay]] || [[word:shuzangay|shuzangay]] || [[word:kuzangay|kuzangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezangay|thezangay]] || [[word:jezangay|jezangay]] || [[word:shezangay|shezangay]] || [[word:kezangay|kezangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozangay|thothozangay]] || [[word:jojozangay|jojozangay]] || [[word:shoshozangay|shoshozangay]] || [[word:kokozangay|kokozangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozangay|thozangay]] || [[word:jozangay|jozangay]] || [[word:shozangay|shozangay]] || [[word:kozangay|kozangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangay|thozangay]] || [[word:jozangay|jozangay]] || [[word:shozangay|shozangay]] || [[word:kozangay|kozangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzangay|thĂŠzangay]] || [[word:jĂŠzangay|jĂŠzangay]] || [[word:shĂŠzangay|shĂŠzangay]] || [[word:kĂŠzangay|kĂŠzangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazangay|thathazangay]] || [[word:jajazangay|jajazangay]] || [[word:shashazangay|shashazangay]] || [[word:kakazangay|kakazangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazangay|thazangay]] || [[word:jazangay|jazangay]] || [[word:shazangay|shazangay]] || [[word:kazangay|kazangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazangay|thazangay]] || [[word:jazangay|jazangay]] || [[word:shazangay|shazangay]] || [[word:kazangay|kazangay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazangay|shazangay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazangay|goshazangay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazangay|gokishazangay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazangaynĂŒ|shazangaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazangaynknĂŒ|goshazangaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazangaynĂŒ|gokishazangaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazangayshĂ«|shazangayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazangaynkshĂ«|goshazangaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazangayshĂ«|gokishazangayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazangayro|shazangayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangaynkro|goshazangaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazangayro|gokishazangayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazangaymu|shazangaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangaynkmu|goshazangaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazangaymu|gokishazangaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazangaysher|shazangaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazangaynksher|goshazangaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazangaysher|gokishazangaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazangayng|shazangayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazangaynkng|goshazangaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazangayng|gokishazangayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazangaya|shazangaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazangaynkya|goshazangaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazangaya|gokishazangaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazangayam|shazangayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazangaynkyam|goshazangaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazangayam|gokishazangayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazangaynĂŒshĂ«|shazangaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazangaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshazangaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazangaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishazangaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazangaynĂŒro|shazangaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangaynknĂŒro|goshazangaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazangaynĂŒro|gokishazangaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazangaynĂŒmu|shazangaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangaynknĂŒmu|goshazangaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazangaynĂŒmu|gokishazangaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazangayshĂ«nĂŒ|shazangayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazangaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazangaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazangayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazangayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazangayshĂ«ro|shazangayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangaynkshĂ«ro|goshazangaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazangayshĂ«ro|gokishazangayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazangayshĂ«mu|shazangayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangaynkshĂ«mu|goshazangaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazangayshĂ«mu|gokishazangayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazangayronĂŒ|shazangayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazangaynkronĂŒ|goshazangaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazangayronĂŒ|gokishazangayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazangayroshĂ«|shazangayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazangaynkroshĂ«|goshazangaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazangayroshĂ«|gokishazangayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazangayromu|shazangayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazangaynkromu|goshazangaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazangayromu|gokishazangayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazangaymunĂŒ|shazangaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazangaynkmunĂŒ|goshazangaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazangaymunĂŒ|gokishazangaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazangaymushĂ«|shazangaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazangaynkmushĂ«|goshazangaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazangaymushĂ«|gokishazangaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazangaymuro|shazangaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazangaynkmuro|goshazangaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazangaymuro|gokishazangaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
